_publications._publicationTitle: [18F]fluorothymidine and [18F]fluorodeoxyglucose PET Imaging Demonstrates Uptake and Differentiates Growth in Neurofibromatosis 2 Related Vestibular Schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: Values ranged from 0.714 to 0.857 with SUV mean and from 0.786 to 0.821 with SUV peak, suggesting a good ability of FDG and FLT SUV values to discriminate indolent from rapidly growing tumors
details: FDG AUC ROC values ranged from 0.786-0.821 and FLT values ranged from 0.714-0.821 for discriminating tumor growth patterns
